subjects.description: small fluffy dog eating watermelon with a spoon on a navy sofa
subjects.appearance_details: compact fluffy dog with bright eyes, playful posture, paws near a shiny silver spoon and red watermelon pieces
subjects.relationship: primary animal subject enjoying a snack in the living room
subjects.location: seated on a plush navy blue sofa beside a cream throw blanket
subjects.relative_size: small pet scale, much smaller than the sofa and bay window
subjects.orientation: facing slightly toward camera while focused on the watermelon
subjects.pose: sitting attentively with front paws close together and head lowered toward the spoon
subjects.action: munches watermelon and nudges a silver spoon into the juicy red flesh
subjects.state_changes: watermelon surface is scooped, dog chews, spoon glints as it moves, soft fur shifts with small motions
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: soft fluffy fur with bright indoor highlights and natural texture
subjects.facial_features: round bright eyes, small nose, alert ears, slightly open chewing mouth

background_setting: A bright living room with hardwood floors, warm beige walls, a large bay window overlooking a landscaped garden, and a cream colored throw blanket over the sofa arm.

lighting.conditions: Bright natural daylight through the bay window, soft garden colored bounce, warm highlights on sofa fabric, spoon, watermelon, and fur.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright natural daylight through the bay window, soft garden colored bounce, warm highlights on sofa fabric, spoon, watermelon, and fur.

aesthetics.composition: Cute domestic whimsy, clean cozy interiors, saturated red watermelon against navy upholstery, playful pet realism.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Cute domestic whimsy, clean cozy interiors, saturated red watermelon against navy upholstery, playful pet realism.

cinematography.camera_motion: Medium close shot from sofa height, shallow depth on the dog, spoon, and watermelon, stable camera with small natural push in.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Photorealistic playful pet text to video.
artistic_style: Warm cozy interior realism with light comedic charm.
context: A fluffy dog sits like a polite guest on a sofa, eating watermelon with a spoon in a bright home.

actions.description: The small fluffy dog sits on the navy sofa and leans toward a red watermelon piece.
It nudges the shiny spoon into the fruit and munches, juice catching the window light.
The dog pauses with a pleased look, then takes another small bite as the garden glows behind it.

segments.description: Introduce the dog seated on the navy sofa with watermelon and spoon.
segments.key_changes: Dog leans in, spoon and fruit become visual focus.

segments.description: Show the playful act of eating with the spoon.
segments.key_changes: Spoon shifts, watermelon flesh is scooped, dog chews visibly.
segments.camera: Small push toward paws, spoon, and face.

segments.description: Hold the cozy living room mood as the dog enjoys another bite.
segments.key_changes: Chewing slows, expression turns pleased, daylight glints off the spoon.
segments.camera: Stable close view with bay window softly blurred.

temporal_caption: A small fluffy dog sits on a navy sofa and happily eats red watermelon with a shiny silver spoon in a bright living room.
audio_description: Soft chewing, light spoon taps, subtle sofa fabric rustle, quiet indoor ambience, and faint birds from the garden window.
